hero.title: BuildSoft
hero.subtitle: Building homes — simple, transparent, and under control.

transparency.title: Full Transparency
transparency.desc: Real-time updated estimates with detailed cost breakdown for every material, labor, and phase.

monitoring.title: Real-Time Monitoring
monitoring.desc: Track construction progress, deadlines, and budgets from anywhere with photo reports.

protection.title: Financial Protection
protection.desc: Escrow payment system ensures money is released only after work is verified and approved.

constructor.title: Smart Constructor
constructor.desc: Choose your parameters and get an instant 3D visualization with a detailed cost estimate.

optimization.title: AI Cost Optimization
optimization.desc: Artificial intelligence detects overspending risks and suggests optimizations.

postConstruction.title: Post-Construction Services
postConstruction.desc: Interior design, furniture, insurance, and ongoing home maintenance — all in one platform.

footer.description: A digital platform for private home construction covering the full cycle from idea to key handover.

contract.title: Contract Documentation
contract.subtitle: Everything you need to know about how BuildSoft contracts work
contract.step1Desc: Once you select a contractor, a digital contract is formed directly on the platform with clear terms, milestones, and deadlines.
contract.step2Desc: Payments are divided into construction phases. Funds are held in escrow and released only after each phase is verified.
contract.step3Desc: Independent technical inspectors verify each construction phase before payment release.
contract.step4Desc: BuildSoft acts as a neutral mediator. Automated penalty clauses and compensation models protect both parties.
contract.escrowDesc: Your money is held securely until work is confirmed. No advance payments to unverified contractors.
contract.penaltyDesc: Delays and deviations trigger automatic penalty clauses defined in the contract.
contract.warrantyDesc: Construction quality is backed by warranty periods defined in every contract.
contract.compensationDesc: If deadlines are missed, compensation models kick in automatically to protect your investment.

partnership.title: Partnership
partnership.subtitle: Join BuildSoft as a trusted construction partner
partnership.benefit1Desc: Access a constant stream of verified clients looking for reliable construction services.
partnership.benefit2Desc: Every project comes with detailed technical requirements — no ambiguity.
partnership.benefit3Desc: Get paid promptly after each verified construction phase via our escrow system.
partnership.benefit4Desc: Earn ratings and reviews that attract more clients through our transparent rating system.
partnership.success: Message sent successfully! We'll get back to you soon.
partnership.error: Failed to send message. Please try again.

about.title: About BuildSoft
about.subtitle: Transforming how homes are built
about.missionDesc: To make home building as simple and understandable as booking a taxi or buying an airline ticket. We bring full transparency, real-time control, and financial security to private construction.
about.storyDesc: Every year, thousands of families start building a home. And almost all of them face the same problems: prices increase during construction, there's no clear estimate, deadlines are delayed, and the final result doesn't match expectations. BuildSoft was created to solve these problems once and for all.
about.value1Desc: Every cost, every stage, every material — visible and trackable.
about.value2Desc: Real-time monitoring of your project from anywhere in the world.
about.value3Desc: Financial safeguards that protect both homeowners and contractors.
about.value4Desc: AI-powered optimization and smart home construction technology.
